description.overview: The original Irish setter, predating the all-red variety. They're athletic, friendly dogs with a distinctive parti-color coat of white with red patches.
description.history: The Irish Red and White Setter originated in Ireland.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, spirited, determined.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their fine, silky with feathering coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The original Irish setter, predating the all-red variety. They're athletic, friendly dogs with a distinctive parti-color coat of white with red patches.
